questions.question: What is the name of the Pokémon Professor in the Hoenn region?

What is Team Rocket’s iconic motto opening line in the Pokémon anime?
options: To unite the world under one nation!
To protect the world from devastation!
To fight for truth and equality!
To uphold the ideals of love and passion!
